title: More Brushes
description: Adds the standardized vanilla tiers to brushes.
body:
Adds the standardized vanilla tiers to brushes.

![Brush Types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BNLbEGeO/images/6ff44c65c1451fd5a82cd09713ce9f79a297d4a3.png)

**Copper Brush (Vanilla):** 64 HP

**Iron Brush: 135 HP**

**Golden Brush: 53 HP**

**Diamond Brush: 220 HP**

**Netherite Brush: 436 HP**

Feature complete. These brushes are great for Vanilla+ playthroughs.

Follow the link below and use code "JACKBUSTERS" at checkout for 25% off server hosting.
